project.desc: With a clean, responsive design, the site adapts to any device, making it easy for customers to explore services and get in touch.

teaser.r1: Behind every project there's curiosity, dedication, and a journey in progress.
teaser.r2: Discover who I am and what drives me to create.

1.desc: With a clean, responsive design, the site adapts to any device, making it easy for customers to explore services and get in touch.

2.desc: Tourists move fast — the site keeps up. Every section is built to turn curiosity into a booking, from any device, in seconds.

text.p1: I got into programming the way most kids do — through video games and a older brother who studied computer engineering. That early curiosity never left.
text.p2: I'm studying Computer Science in Pisa — and honestly, my favorite part isn't writing code. It's the moment you finally understand why something works the way it does. Data structures, algorithms, the invisible decisions behind software you use every day without thinking about it.
text.bigP: The thing that probably makes me a bit different is that I've never been able to separate how something works from how it feels.
text.p3: I get genuinely bothered by a button that's slightly off, an animation that doesn't quite land, a transition that breaks the flow. My friends have always told me my sites look different from everyone else's — I'll take that.
text.p4: When I'm not coding, I'm shooting photos, listening to rock and metal, or reading — lately Cal Newport's Deep Work, which probably explains a lot about how I approach my work.
